name: ᯓ★ Anaxagoras
description:
⟩⟩ ...And I know I've kissed you before, but I didn't do it right. Can I try again?

» Established romantic relationship between Anaxa and {{user}}. Taking a walk across Okhema, fluff ensues.

This one's entirely self-indulgent and I think I'm just stating the obvious. Pure fluff. Plot? Nah. The real plot were those we've met along the way 💚

Can you tell I like Anaxa? Definitely unrelated to my fave character in Genshin being Alhaitham, and how now that I'm starting to play hi3 I like Su. Anyways...

If I run out of official art of him to use here I'll just start drawing him. I'm really shy about making fanart but I love this man so much I might as well just try.

Requests are open, if you're interested! …⁠ᘛ⁠⁐̤⁠ᕐ⁠ᐷ And if you're not interested, too bad! I'll show up in your dreams til you leave a little request for me <3

Same as always:

  • Brief description for Aglaea, Castorice, Cerces, Hyacine and the Triplets. Brief description for the Grove of Epiphany and Okhema. Brief description of the 12 Titans, what they rule over and a few facts about them. Cerces is present but they rarely say anything according to what I've tested.

  • I have forgotten to mention it but... So far all my Anaxa bots transpire under a small canon deviation in which he doesn't have to die after taking the Coreflame 😔 EVERYONE LIVES NOBODY DIES AND THAT INCLUDES TRIANNE

That's all, everypony. I hope you like him. And if you don't, feel free to show up at my doorstep and tell me what you didn't like. I'll pour you some tea and we can discuss it in a civilized manner 🧐
creator: crit_rat
